overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a luxurious, darkly lit modern corridor from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily past large windows, neon art installations, and digital wall displays, transitioning from a bright entry hallway to a narrow corridor ending at a metal door.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment entry corridor with tall windows

events.description: passing red fire extinguisher mounted on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor alongside bright windows

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows flooding the corridor with bright natural light
red fire safety equipment mounted on the dark paneled wall
colorful framed artwork hanging on the right wall
sleek dark wood or metal paneling covering the corridor walls
crimson carpet runner with gold trim lines the hallway floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious corridor with dark walls and a red carpet. Bright natural light streams through large windows on the left as the camera walks forward, passing a fire extinguisher mounted on the left wall around the 8-second mark.

events.description: passing glowing red neon sculptures that cast colored light on the walls

agents.ego_description: continuing down the hallway past decorative neon art installations

entered.detail: decorative vase containing glowing red branch-like neon sculpture
small black table holding the neon sculpture

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with the windows now further behind. The camera passes striking neon art installations on the right side—glowing red sculptures in vases on pedestal tables. The lighting shifts to incorporate the red glow from these art pieces.

events.description: transitioning from neon sculpture area to section with digital wall screens

agents.ego_description: moving past the neon sculptures toward the digital displays on the walls

entered.detail: wall-mounted display showing abstract colorful digital artwork
rectangular screen displaying vibrant abstract imagery
low wooden credenza against the left wall beneath the windows

segments.scene_description: Leaving the neon sculptures behind, the scene transitions to a gallery-like section featuring digital displays mounted on the walls showing abstract art. A wooden cabinet sits beneath the receding windows on the left as the corridor continues deeper into the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to metal door

events.description: approaching the metal door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal door at the end of the hallway

entered.detail: narrow vertical light fixture embedded in the right wall
dark metal door marking the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The corridor narrows and grows darker, illuminated only by vertical light strips and the remaining digital displays. The red carpet continues toward a metal door at the far end, which the camera approaches steadily in the final moments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious modern corridor that transitions from a bright, window-lit hallway into a dark, narrow passage. It begins by gliding forward over a red carpet, passing a fire extinguisher as bright natural light streams in from large windows on the left. As the windows recede, the lighting shifts to a moody red glow emanating from neon sculptures on pedestal tables that line the right side of the path. The scene then opens into a gallery-like section featuring abstract digital displays on the walls and a wooden cabinet, before the space gradually narrows and grows darker. Finally, the camera moves past vertical light strips toward a solitary metal door at the far end of the corridor.
